results.student_answer: The Paradise Ranch RV resort sustained significant damage from the tornado. The tornado caused extensive damage to the resort's buildings, including the destruction of several RV units, the main office, and other structures. The resort was left with severe structural damage, requiring significant repairs and cleanup efforts.

results.question: When did the Storm Prediction Center begin monitoring the imminent threat that included this tornado event?
results.student_answer: The Storm Prediction Center began monitoring the imminent threat that included this tornado event on May 3, 2020, at 12:17 PM CDT.

results.question: When did the Kentwood–Carson tornado occur and what were its start and end times?
results.reference_answer: Saturday, March 15, 2025; it began at 12:17 p.m. CDT and dissipated at 1:39 p.m. CDT.
results.student_answer: The Kentwood–Carson tornado occurred on May 22, 2020, from 12:17 p.m. CDT (UTC-05:00) to approximately 3:30 p.m. CDT.

results.question: Where did the Kentwood–Carson tornado begin?
results.reference_answer: One mile east-northeast of Kentwood in Tangipahoa Parish, Louisiana.
results.student_answer: The Kentwood–Carson tornado began at 12:17 p.m. CDT (UTC-05:00), just off of LA 38 and to the east of I-55, one mile to the east-northeast of Kentwood in Tangipahoa Parish, Louisiana.

results.question: How many people did the EF4 Kentwood–Carson tornado kill?
results.student_answer: The EF4 Kentwood–Carson tornado killed two people.

results.question: What maximum wind speed and Enhanced Fujita rating did the National Weather Service assign to the tornado?
results.reference_answer: Maximum winds of 170 mph (270 km/h), rated a low-end EF4.
results.student_answer: The National Weather Service assigned a maximum wind speed of 165 mph (265 km/h) to the tornado and an Enhanced Fujita (EF) rating of EF3.

results.question: What damage did the tornado cause to the Paradise Ranch RV resort in Walthall County?
results.reference_answer: It destroyed all 27 cabins and 210 campsites.
results.student_answer: The tornado caused significant damage to the Paradise Ranch RV resort in Walthall County, including ripping off the roof of the main lodge and damaging several RVs.
